# Issue templates

Available templates:

- Bug report
- Feature request
- Architecture decision

Labels to create manually on GitHub (recommended):

| Label | Use |
|---|---|
| `bug` | Defects |
| `enhancement` | Features |
| `architecture` | ADR / design |
| `documentation` | Docs-only |
| `mvp` | In MVP scope |
| `post-mvp` | After pilot |
| `good first issue` | Onboarding |

Milestones (optional, create on GitHub UI):

1. `0 - Discovery`
2. `1 - Skeleton`
3. `2 - Jira Board`
4. `3 - Timeline`
5. `4 - Feed & Risks`
6. `5 - Release Health`
7. `6 - Pilot`
8. `7 - AI Summary`
